#!/bin/bash
MY_VAR="hello"
export PATH_EXT="/usr/local/bin"
readonly MAX_COUNT=10
declare -r BUILD_VERSION="1.0.0"
DEBUG_MODE=0
declare -a LANGUAGES=("python" "rust" "go" "java" "typescript")
declare -A EXT_MAP=(
[py]="python"
[rs]="rust"
[go]="go"
[java]="java"
[ts]="typescript"
)
function greet() {
local name="${1:?Name required}"
if [[ -z "$name" ]]; then
echo "Error: empty name" >&2
return 1
fi
echo "Hello ${name}!"
}
cleanup() {
local tmp_dir="${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/myapp_$$"
if [[ -d "$tmp_dir" ]]; then
rm -rf "$tmp_dir"
fi
echo "Cleanup complete"
}
parse_args() {
local opt
while getopts "vdhf:o:" opt; do
case "$opt" in
v)
VERBOSE=1
;;
d)
DEBUG_MODE=1
;;
f)
INPUT_FILE="$OPTARG"
;;
o)
OUTPUT_FILE="$OPTARG"
;;
h)
echo "Usage: $0 [-v] [-d] [-f file] [-o output] [-h]"
return 0
;;
*)
echo "Unknown option: $opt" >&2
return 1
;;
esac
done
shift $((OPTIND - 1))
}
process_file() {
local input="$1"
local output="${2:-/dev/stdout}"
if [[ ! -f "$input" ]]; then
echo "Error: file not found: $input" >&2
return 1
fi
if [[ ! -r "$input" ]]; then
echo "Error: file not readable: $input" >&2
return 1
fi
local line_count
line_count=$(wc -l < "$input")
echo "Processing $input ($line_count lines)" >&2
while IFS= read -r line; do
[[ -z "$line" || "$line" =~ ^[[:space:]]*
echo "$line"
done < "$input" > "$output"
return 0
}
retry_command() {
local max_attempts="$1"
shift
local attempt=1
while (( attempt <= max_attempts )); do
if "$@"; then
return 0
fi
echo "Attempt $attempt/$max_attempts failed" >&2
(( attempt++ ))
sleep $(( 2 ** (attempt - 1) ))
done
echo "All $max_attempts attempts failed" >&2
return 1
}
log_message() {
local level="$1"
shift
local timestamp
timestamp=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
echo "[$timestamp] [$level] $*" >&2
}
make_temp() {
local tmpfile
tmpfile=$(mktemp "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/myapp_XXXXXX")
echo "$tmpfile"
}
trap cleanup EXIT
trap 'echo "Interrupted"; exit 130' INT TERM
generate_config() {
cat <<EOF
version=${BUILD_VERSION}
debug=${DEBUG_MODE}
max_count=${MAX_COUNT}
EOF
}
factorial() {
local n="${1:-1}"
local result=1
local i
for (( i = 2; i <= n; i++ )); do
(( result *= i ))
done
echo "$result"
}
if [[ -f ./config.sh ]]; then
source ./config.sh
fi
source ./env.sh
. ./helpers.sh
source ./shared.sh
. ./paths.sh
source ./runtime.sh
. ./exports.sh
source ./network.sh
req_cover_shell_1() {
echo "$(( $1 + 1 ))"
}
req_cover_shell_2() {
echo "$(( $1 + 2 ))"
}
req_cover_shell_3() {
echo "$(( $1 + 3 ))"
}
req_cover_shell_4() {
echo "$(( $1 + 4 ))"
}
req_cover_shell_5() {
echo "$(( $1 + 5 ))"
}
